suggestions.title: Mashobra becomes first area in Shimla to receive 24x7 drinking water supply - The Tribune
suggestions.summary: Auto-detected from press: "Mashobra becomes first area in Shimla to receive 24x7 drinking water supply - The Tribune" — review the linked article and edit before promoting.

methodology: Keyword scan of press snapshot. False positives are normal — a signed-in moderator reviews each before promotion. Categories: incident, defect, audit, grievance, litigation.
